mapper.insert: INSERT INTO party (name, creator_id, created_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{creatorId}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT p.party_id AS partyId, p.name AS name, p.creator_id AS creatorId, pm.role AS role, pm.joined_at AS joinedAt, p.created_at AS createdAt, p.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM party_member pm JOIN party p ON p.party_id = pm.party_id WHERE pm.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY pm.joined_at DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM party WHERE party_id = #{partyId} AND creator_id = #{memberId}
